result.stdout:
USAGE:
    gitlab-summary [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --since 24h
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --since 2d --detailed
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --project api-service
    gitlab-summary serve --group my-org --open
    gitlab-summary serve --group my-org --port 8080 --interval 60

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    token        Manage GitLab access token                                  
    pipelines    Show pipeline activity summary for a GitLab group           
    serve        Start SSE dashboard server for real-time pipeline monitoring

OPTIONS:

COMMANDS:

    pipelines    Show pipeline activity summary for a GitLab group

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Show pipeline activity summary for a GitLab group

USAGE:
    gitlab-summary pipelines [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --since 24h
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --since 2d --detailed
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --project api-service

OPTIONS:
                               DEFAULT                                          
    -h, --help                            Prints help information               
    -g, --group <GROUP>                   GitLab group ID or path (e.g. 'my-org'
                                          or '12345')                           
    -s, --since <SINCE>        24h        Time range from now (e.g. '24h', '2d',
                                          '30m'). Default: 24h, Max: 30d        
    -p, --project <PROJECT>               Filter to a specific project name     
                                          (partial match)                       
    -d, --detailed                        Show detailed per-pipeline breakdown  
    -u, --url <URL>                       GitLab instance URL (overrides saved  
                                          config)                               
    -w, --watch <INTERVAL>                Refresh output every N seconds/minutes
                                          (e.g. '30' for 30s, '1m' for 1        
                                          minute). Press Ctrl+C to exit

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Show pipeline activity summary for a GitLab group

USAGE:
    gitlab-summary pipelines [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --since 24h
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --since 2d --detailed
    gitlab-summary pipelines --group my-org --project api-service

OPTIONS:
                               DEFAULT                                          
    -h, --help                            Prints help information               
    -g, --group <GROUP>                   GitLab group ID or path (e.g. 'my-org'
                                          or '12345')                           
    -s, --since <SINCE>        24h        Time range from now (e.g. '24h', '2d',
                                          '30m'). Default: 24h, Max: 30d        
    -p, --project <PROJECT>               Filter to a specific project name     
                                          (partial match)                       
    -d, --detailed                        Show detailed per-pipeline breakdown  
    -u, --url <URL>                       GitLab instance URL (overrides saved  
                                          config)                               
    -w, --watch <INTERVAL>                Refresh output every N seconds/minutes
                                          (e.g. '30' for 30s, '1m' for 1        
                                          minute). Press Ctrl+C to exit

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Start SSE dashboard server for real-time pipeline monitoring

USAGE:
    gitlab-summary serve [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary serve --group my-org --open
    gitlab-summary serve --group my-org --port 8080 --interval 60

OPTIONS:
                                DEFAULT                                         
    -h, --help                                       Prints help information    
    -g, --group <GROUP>                              GitLab group ID or path    
    -s, --since <SINCE>         24h                  Time range from now (e.g.  
                                                     '24h', '2d'). Default: 24h 
        --port <PORT>           5100                 Server port (default: 5100)
        --open                                       Open dashboard in browser  
    -u, --url <URL>                                  GitLab instance URL        
                                                     (overrides saved config)   
        --interval <SECONDS>    30                   Refresh interval in seconds
                                                     (default: 30)              
        --ai-model <MODEL>      claude-sonnet-4-5    Copilot model to use for AI
                                                     analysis (default:         
                                                     claude-sonnet-4-5)

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Start SSE dashboard server for real-time pipeline monitoring

USAGE:
    gitlab-summary serve [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary serve --group my-org --open
    gitlab-summary serve --group my-org --port 8080 --interval 60

OPTIONS:
                                DEFAULT                                         
    -h, --help                                       Prints help information    
    -g, --group <GROUP>                              GitLab group ID or path    
    -s, --since <SINCE>         24h                  Time range from now (e.g.  
                                                     '24h', '2d'). Default: 24h 
        --port <PORT>           5100                 Server port (default: 5100)
        --open                                       Open dashboard in browser  
    -u, --url <URL>                                  GitLab instance URL        
                                                     (overrides saved config)   
        --interval <SECONDS>    30                   Refresh interval in seconds
                                                     (default: 30)              
        --ai-model <MODEL>      claude-sonnet-4-5    Copilot model to use for AI
                                                     analysis (default:         
                                                     claude-sonnet-4-5)

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage GitLab access token

USAGE:
    gitlab-summary token [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary token url https://gitlab.example.com

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    set          Store or update the GitLab access token
    url <URL>    Set the GitLab instance URL            
    show         Display the stored token (masked)      
    clear        Remove the stored token

    clear        Remove the stored token

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Set the GitLab instance URL

USAGE:
    gitlab-summary token url <URL> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    gitlab-summary token url https://gitlab.example.com

ARGUMENTS:
    <URL>    GitLab instance URL (e.g. https://gitlab.example.com)

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information
